title: Jamaican Chocolate Chip Crumble
description: A rich and satisfying dessert featuring a crunchy oat crumble topping over a decadent Jamaican chocolate chip mixture.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, oat crumble mix, and smoked sea salt. Add cold butter and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press half of the crumb mixture into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar, cocoa powder, and Jamaican spice blend. Add chocolate chips and stir until well combined.
Spread the chocolate mixture over the crumb mixture in the baking dish.
Top with the remaining crumb mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
